flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California State University-Fullerton rose 18% between 2007 and 2010 ($8.9k → $10.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California State University-Fullerton fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California State University-Fullerton rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 (29.0% → 39.0%).
